summary: Growth Engine for Daily Viral Idea Drop - Full testing complete. All 27 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all Growth Engine features working: Public share page (/viral/{jobId}), Share buttons (WhatsApp, Twitter, Copy), Soft paywall fields (locked, share_url), Growth metrics endpoint, Referral tracking.
seed_data_creation: Used existing completed job ce680be0-51c6-4560-810e-25a058dfcd8d for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Engine fully tested. Key verified features: (1) Public share teaser at /viral/{job_id} returns top_hook, script_teaser, caption_teaser, thumbnail_url, total_packs_generated (floor 500), (2) Share tracking at POST /share/{job_id}/track stores share_event without auth, (3) Soft paywall: first gen free, subsequent gens deduct 5 credits when user has credits, locked=true when no credits, (4) Unlock endpoint deducts 5 credits and sets locked=false, returns 'already unlocked' for unlocked jobs, (5) Growth metrics at /metrics/growth returns generations, shares, share_views, share_to_signup, free_to_paid, unlocks, pack_completions, (6) Referral tracking at /track-referral stores share_to_signup metric. Frontend: ViralPackShare.js renders public teaser with blurred thumbnail, CTAs (Generate Your Own Free Pack, Unlock Full Pack), social proof count, 30-second speed proof. DailyViralIdeas.js result view shows share buttons (WhatsApp, Twitter, Copy), locked banner for locked jobs, download button hidden for locked jobs.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/viral-ideas/share/{job_id}: PASS - returns teaser data without auth
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/viral-ideas/share/{job_id}/tra: PASS - stores share event without auth
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/viral-ideas/generate-bundle: PASS - returns locked and share_url fields
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/viral-ideas/jobs/{job_id}: PASS - includes locked and share_url fields
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/viral-ideas/my-jobs: PASS - includes locked and share_url for each job
